text: The provisions of Section 16451 shall not apply to vehicles in storage if the current license plates and registration cards are surrendered to the department in Sacramento.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 7. FINANCIAL RESPONSIBILITY LAWS [16000 - 16560]
### Chapter 3. Proof of Financial Responsibility [16430 - 16484]
#### Article 2. Insurance Policy [16450 - 16457]
##### § 16455

The provisions of Section 16451 shall not apply to vehicles in storage if the current license plates and registration cards are surrendered to the department in Sacramento.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The provisions of Section 16451 shall not apply to vehicles in storage if the current license plates and registration cards are surrendered to the department in Sacramento.
